name: WFBE_NEURODEF_AAPOS_EAST
notes: AA POSITION (LIGHT, 2 AI) — EAST. Same soldier logic as the WEST twin: a ZU-23 auto-cannon (bullet AA, also murders soft ground targets) paired with an Igla MANPADS on a dispersed sandbag pit facing the air-threat arc (+Y), ~8 m apart for survivability. Rear DShK covers the guns' blind side and gives 360 self-defence. HBarrier flank wings stop enfilade without capping elevation. Ammo behind cover left; camo nets set behind the guns, never overhead; forward wire canalizes dismounts and leaves a clear rear-right entrance.

objs.role: ZU-23 auto-cannon (left) — primary arc NW, dispersed
Igla MANPADS (right) — primary arc NE, dispersed
rear DShK — covers blind side + 360 self-defence
left flank wing — stops enfilade, no overhead
right flank wing — stops enfilade, no overhead
concealment — behind ZU-23, off the firing line
concealment — behind Igla, off the firing line
forward-left wire — canalizes dismounts, rear-right entrance clear
